description: You are a surgical robotics engineer. In the Webots simulation, add two sensor nodes to the 'children' list of the 'ABLATION_TOOL' end-effector. Configure a 'Pen' node named 'ablation_trace' with inkColor 0.8 0.1 0.1, leadSize 0.002, and maxDistance 0.01. Also, add a 'TouchSensor' node named 'tip_force_sensor' with type 'force-3d' and translation 0 0 -0.05. Save the validated world to /home/ga/Desktop/validated_surgical_sim.wbt.
